sections.paragraph:
m. & עֶשְׂרֵה f. id., only used in numbers compounded with ten, as אַחַד עָשָׂר m. eleven; עָשָׂר אַרְבָּעָה m. fourteen; שִׁשָּׁה עָשָׂר sixteen, m.; also eleventh, fourteenth, sixteenth; fem. אַחַת עֶשְׂרֵה eleven; שֵׁשׁ עֶשְׂרֵה sixteen, also eleventh, sixteenth.

Pl. עֶשְׂרִים (from the sing. עֶשְׂרֵה)-

(1) twenty, of both genders, with a sing. and pl. noun, Gen 31:38 Lev 27:5.

(2) twentieth, Num 10:11 1Ki 15:9 16:10 .
